name: Multiclient Study: Is Linux Already a Viable Alternative OS for Small Business?
description: Aberdeen Group proposes a multiclient research study to evaluate Linux adoption and viability as an alternative operating system for small businesses globally. The study outlines qualitative (25 on-site interviews) and quantitative (400 telephone interviews) research methodologies to assess Linux acceptance depth, breadth, and timing in the $20M–$100M small business segment. Subscription tiers range from $10,000 (Reader) to $28,000 (Sponsor) with a target delivery of January 31, 2000.
